Indications.Text: Susceptible infections (e.g. sinusitis, salmonellosis, oral infections)

Doses.DoseStatement: 125|mg 3 times a day, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day.
250|mg 3 times a day, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day.
500|mg 3 times a day, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day (max. per dose 1|g).
500|mg 3 times a day, increased if necessary up to 1|g 3 times a day, use increased dose in severe infections.
500|mg every 8|hours, increased if necessary to 1|g every 8|hours, increased dose used in severe infections.

Routes.Route: By intravenous injection, or by intravenous infusion

Doses.DoseStatement: 500|mg every 8|hours, increased to 1|g every 6|hours, use increased dose in severe infections.
125|mg 3 times a day for 5 days, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day.
125|mg 3 times a day for 3 days, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day.
250|mg 3 times a day for 3 days, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day.
500|mg 3 times a day for 3 days, increased if necessary up to 30|mg/kg 3 times a day (max. per dose 1|g).
500|mg 3 times a day for 5 days, increased if necessary up to 1|g 3 times a day.
500|mg 3 times a day for 5 days, increased if necessary to 1|g 3 times a day.

Indications.Text: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

Doses.DoseStatement: 500|mg 3 times a day for 5 days, increased if necessary to 1|g 3 times a day, increased dose used in severe infections.

Routes.Route: By intravenous injection, or by intravenous infusion

Doses.DoseStatement: 500|mg every 8|hours, increased to 1|g every 6|hours, increased dose used in severe infections.

Indications.Text: Acute cough [if systemically very unwell or at higher risk of complications]
Lyme disease [erythema migrans and/or non-focal symptoms],

Doses.DoseStatement: 3|g for 1 dose, then 3|g for 1 dose, to be given 8 hours after the first dose.

Indications.Text: Endocarditis (in combination with another antibiotic if necessary)
Helicobacter pylori eradication [in combination with other drugs]

Doses.DoseStatement: 1|g twice daily for 7 days for first- and second-line eradication therapy; 10 days for third-line eradication therapy.

Indications.Text: Acute diverticulitis [in combination with gentamicin and metronidazole]

Routes.Route: By intravenous injection, or by intravenous infusion

Doses.DoseStatement: 500|mg every 8|hours; increased if necessary to 1|g every 6|hours, increased dose used in severe infections.

Indications.Text: Prophylaxis of recurrent urinary-tract infection in non-pregnant females [using single-dose antibacterial prophylaxis]

Doses.DoseStatement: 500|mg for 1 dose, dose to be taken following exposure to a trigger.

Indications.Text: Prophylaxis of recurrent urinary-tract infection [using daily antibacterial prophylaxis]

Doses.DoseStatement: 250|mg once daily, dose to be taken at night, seek specialist advice if considering use for prophylaxis during pregnancy, in male patients, or for recurrent upper urinary-tract infection or recurrent complicated lower urinary-tract infection.
3|g for 1 dose, then 3|g for 1 dose, to be given 10-12 hours after the first dose.
250-500|mg 3 times a day, alternatively 750-1000|mg twice daily.
